label: Vitrary Reliquary
description: The Vitrary Reliquary is a narrow, tile-faced storage chamber set behind the Temple of the Faultlight Canon’s faceted interior walls, its surfaces treated with dust-slick vitrification to shed electrostatic glass fallouts into grounded gutters. Shallow lensing cisterns line the baseboards, keeping the chamber’s air clear and its contents dry by drawing charge and moisture into sealed channels. Mirror-slat vents admit only attenuated copper-white bands, rendering shelves and lockers in precise, measurable strips of light. The room’s fittings consist of fused-silicate racks, lidded glassstone bins, and inset floor inlays keyed to the temple’s faultline geometry for cataloging by seam-alignment rather than alphabet.
